summary_context: Merged upstream Codeing_harness_killer repository updates into local Codeing_harness_killer/ folder without affecting main app code or active agent configuration in the root directory.

History.user: ช่วยเอา Project นี้ Merge เข้ามาหน่อย โดยไม่ยุ่งกับ code หลักของเรา
History.agent: Cloned the remote Codeing_harness_killer repo into a temporary folder, copied all files into the local Codeing_harness_killer/ directory to update it with the upstream, cleaned up temporary files, updated index databases, and logged the task on the roadmap.
